description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a large carport extending from one side. The front features a covered porch with visible support columns and a small landscaped area with shrubs and a tree. The driveway leads up to the carport, bordered by low hedges, and there is a backyard area with a circular pool. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, possibly stucco or painted siding, with a contrasting darker roof. Windows are arranged in a regular pattern along the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The overall layout is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, carport, driveway, and backyard pool, surrounded by landscaping and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, driveway, and landscaping with shrubs and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, long driveway, and backyard pool, with the porch partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, circular pool, and the back of the bungalow with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the carport, hedges, and the side facade with windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
